infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: SafeRoad needs your location to report and track potholes.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: SafeRoad needs background location access to alert you of nearby potholes.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: SafeRoad needs camera access to take photos of potholes.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: SafeRoad needs photo library access to upload pothole images.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow SafeRoad to use your location to track potholes and alert you of nearby hazards.

plugins.motionPermission: Allow SafeRoad to access motion sensors to detect road bumps and potholes.
